title: euonymus mexicanus
intro: Euonymus mexicanus, also known as Mexican strawberry or Mexican snowberry, is a deciduous shrub native to Mexico and Central America. The plant has been traditionally used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which have been found to have potential benefits in reducing inflammation and protecting against cell damage. The health benefits of Euonymus mexicanus include its use as a treatment for respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and coughs, as well as its potential to help lower blood pressure and improve cardiovascular health. Euonymus mexicanus is typically prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and can also be used as a topical cream or ointment for skin issues and wounds.
